英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯
zh.Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭爾波利 費
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fitton I於大約1278年出生在英國爾加福斯沃斯時，他的父親Sir Edmund Fitton24歲，母親Lady Ellen Joyce27歲。他於大約1295年與Isabel Orreby結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1335年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯
zh-hans.Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Englan: 英国英格兰爾波利 費
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fitton I于大约1278年出生在英国爾加福斯沃斯时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Fitton24岁，母亲Lady Ellen Joyce27岁。他于大约1295年与Isabel Orreby结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1335年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fitton I was born about 1278, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Edmund Fitton, was 24 and his mother, Lady Ellen Joyce, was 27. He married Isabel Orreby about 1295. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1335, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fitton I est né environ 1278, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Fitton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen Joyce, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Orreby environ 1295. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1335, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

Er hat um 1295 Isabel Orreby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1335 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitton Iが約1278年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Fittonは24歳，母Lady Ellen Joyceは27歳であった。約1295年にIsabel Orrebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1335年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitton I(이)가 대략 1278년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Fitton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ellen Joyce(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1295년 Isabel Orreby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1335년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fitton I родился около 1278 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Fitton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen Joyce, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Orreby около 1295 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1335 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.
